category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Helm-like configuration values loader with support for various sources; Helmfile context places it in cloud-native configuration workflows.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official helmfile/vals repository use the lowercase name vals.
docs_sources: The official helmfile/vals README documents vals usage and supported ref backends.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/helmfile/vals; per instructions it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Helm-like values loading; the official README documents configuration values and source backends.
